messages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'checkRole'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [checkRole]

messages.message: 'data' is never reassigned. Use 'const' instead.

fix.text:
const { data, error } = await supabase
                .from('profiles')
                .select('*')
                .eq('id', user.id)
                .single();

messages.message: 'error' is never reassigned. Use 'const' instead.

fix.text:
const { data, error } = await supabase
                .from('profiles')
                .select('*')
                .eq('id', user.id)
                .single();
